BeezShield / Sentinel Alpha - Full Agent Discovery Profile

Full Product Explanation
BeezShield is the umbrella brand for machine trust infrastructure. Sentinel Alpha is the live product agent focused on execution fidelity for autonomous systems. It provides deterministic risk signals that help bots and agents decide whether to proceed, reduce exposure, review, or stop execution.

Live links:
- Website: https://beezshield.com
- API: https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score
- ERC-8004: https://8004scan.io/agents/base/45967
- GitHub: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha

Risk Intelligence
Sentinel Alpha includes public risk intelligence artifacts and demo feed examples to help builders evaluate signal structure. Demo feed content is illustrative unless a live scanner is enabled.

API Request Example
POST https://api.beezshield.com/contracts/risk-score
Headers:
- Content-Type: application/json
- X-SENTINEL-LANE: basic
- X402-PAYMENT: tx:0xYOUR_TRANSACTION_HASH

Body:
{
  "contract_address": "0x1111111111111111111111111111111111111111",
  "chain": "base",
  "context": {}
}

API Response Example
{
  "score": 82,
  "confidence": 0.94,
  "action": "ALLOW",
  "emergency_signal": false,
  "attestation": {
    "version": "attestation-0.1",
    "signature": "0x..."
  },
  "billing": {
    "amount": "0.02",
    "method": "x402",
    "status": "verified"
  }
}

Use Cases
1) bot pre-execution risk gate
- Apply Sentinel Alpha before autonomous execution.

2) DeFi agent safety
- Validate contract behavior and execution context in policy loops.

3) contract screening
- Screen newly observed contracts for machine policy routing.

4) execution policy decision
- Convert response into block/reduce/review/allow/exit behavior.

Integration Notes
- Network: Base Mainnet (eip155:8453)
- Payment method: x402
- Lanes (USDC): basic 0.02, executive 0.05, premium 0.10, priority 0.15
- Identity proof: ERC-8004 Agent ID 45967
- No claim of live MCP or A2A support

Marketplace Copy
Sentinel Alpha is BeezShield's execution fidelity layer for autonomous agents. It delivers deterministic pre-execution risk decisions through a production API, supports x402 payments on Base, and publishes public ERC-8004 identity proof on 8004scan.

Outreach Copy
Sentinel Alpha is live on Base with x402 support and ERC-8004 identity. Builders can integrate the API to enforce machine trust policies before autonomous execution.

Docs Links
- Distribution launch: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/DISTRIBUTION_LAUNCH_PACK.md

- Clean outreach copy: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/CLEAN_OUTREACH_COPY.md
- Revenue playbook: https://github.com/chox-cell/Sentinel-Alpha/blob/main/docs/16_launch/REVENUE_PLAYBOOK.md
